title: Create the architect Teammate (research + standards authoring)
description: Stand up architect as a persistent Teammate: author its agent definition (the _teammate.template shape — Owns / Does-not-own / Process / Constraints) and add its roster rows to CONTEXT.md and TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md (roster, routing, gates). architect owns durable research (.excn/research/) and authoring engineering standards (CODE_STANDARDS.md) from researched best practices; proposes, does not ratify (Team Lead keeps final approval); writes no product/implementation code; every standard edit it authors rides the alignment gate, landing chartered (ADR-0004) or via the Retro Loop. Seam: Team Lead keeps arbitration/final-approval/template/Adherence-agent authoring (architect authors the rubric, TL authors the gate); scribe keeps the Retro Loop; builder/viewer keep implementation code.
acceptance_criteria: architect agent def exists in the _teammate.template shape
CONTEXT.md roster + TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md roster/routing/gates list architect with the seam above and no overlap with existing Teammates
the def change passes alignment and is Team-Lead-approved
no product/implementation code authored in this slice
